# wiki — Code Wiki

> **Topic:** edge-case testing
> **Repo:** /path/to/edge-case-project
> **Initialized:** 2026-05-14
> **Tool:** Claude Code (this file).

This wiki intentionally contains edge-case pages for testing parser and agent robustness:
- Pages with truncated frontmatter (no closing `---`)
- Pages with missing required frontmatter fields
- Pages with wikilinks to non-existent targets

```yaml
version: 1
detected_at: 2026-05-14
repo_root: ..
containers: []
```
